name: notify
description: Push a phone notification (via ntfy.sh) when Claude Code stops, asks you a multiple-choice question, or hits a permission prompt. The title is '<session name>@<cwd>@<user>' and the body is the user's last message. Bundles session-wide Stop / AskUserQuestion / PermissionRequest hooks; run /notify once to configure the ntfy topic. Also bundles an optional macOS desktop receiver (desktop/claude-code-ntfy.sh) that turns the same topic into native notification banners; /notify bakes your topic into your copy as its default subscription.
